name: single-recipe scale ladder p(N)/p_tau(N) (Attempt 2)
question: Where/how do the superlinear floor (p>1) and tau~1/eta switch on with model size, at a single depth-width recipe and fixed bs=48 (G1)?

scales.m: d=384 nh=6 nl=6 (~10.7M) -- existing seed-1337 6-rung ladder reused; train only floor_30/60 @1337 + full 8-rung @1338
scales.xl: d=576 nh=9 nl=9 (~36M) -- stage 2 only (gated; pre-flight one floor_80 rung first)

ladder: 8 rungs eta2 in {0.5,1,2,3,4,6,8,15}e-4, trunk const 1.5e-3 to 3000, T2=round(1.2/eta2) equal-S, seeds 1337+1338, bs=48, eval-gen 12345, N_EVAL=40 last 25%
l_calibration_suite: 9 schedules (constant,cosine,wsd,wsdld,wsdcon_{5,10,20,40,80}) at bs=48 seed 1337 (train_suite.py; G1 overrides train.py bs=40)
staging_gate: extend to ml and xl ONLY if p_hat(l) CI disjoint from p_hat(m) CI, or point p(l) >= 0.9; adaptive seed 1339 only at the two scales bracketing p=1; xl pre-flight floor_80 rung first

power_rehearsal.method: synthetic floors L=1.0385+0.1178 x^p through the exact NLS+residual-bootstrap pipeline (scaleladder_rehearsal.py)
power_rehearsal.primary_power: m->l expected delta-p ~ 0.33 >> 2x pooled half-width (~0.15-0.2): well powered; adjacent scales borderline -> demoted to bonus tier

verdict_tiers.primary_emergence: successive delta-p > 0 across trained scales AND p(top)-p(10.7M) > 2x pooled CI half-width
verdict_tiers.measurement_limited: flat/non-monotone with overlapping CIs after the pre-stated seeds

secondary: p_tau(N) from dense windows (r2>=0.6 gate); coupling criterion: any scale with CI_lower(p)>1 must show p_tau>0.5; p crossing 1 with flat tau = pre-registered falsification of the single-edge-population account
clock_rescope: per-scale AIC pure-S vs affine; committed prediction tau0(N)->infinity as p crosses 1 with lam_S staying O(5)
gate_hardening: at l: compute p from settled probe floors and commit fire(p>1)/pool(p<=1) BEFORE inspecting target residuals; if CI straddles 1 the gate is not scoreable and must not be claimed
exploratory_only: 13-param shared-zeta bulk+edge joint fit (G5: no claims)

continue_close.emergence_or_crossing: CONTINUE to Attempt 3 at the bracketing/p>1 scale; reopen item (f) answered
continue_close.sublinear_through_top: CONTINUE redirected: public 25M p=1.06 not a parameter-count effect at matched recipe; re-scope the paper sentence; Attempt 3 runs m vs largest scale
continue_close.measurement_limited: CLOSE: emergence unmeasurable below ~36M on this bed; do not fish
